name: Colchicine
summary: Low-dose anti-inflammatory small molecule with replicated cardiovascular secondary-prevention outcome evidence.
mechanism_summary: Broad anti-inflammatory therapy that suppresses inflammasome-linked pathways and downstream inflammatory activity rather than selectively blocking one cytokine.

open_questions: Whether low-dose chronic inflammation control has a favorable risk-benefit balance outside cardiovascular secondary prevention
Whether outcome benefits generalize to aging-relevant function, frailty, or prevention populations
